steps.title: Identify the condition for no solution
steps.content:
A linear equation has no solution when the coefficients of $x$ are equal on both sides, but the constant terms differ—creating a false statement like $0 = -5$.

For no solution, set the coefficients of $x$ equal:
$$2k = -\frac{28}{15}$$

steps.title: Solve for k
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$k = -\frac{28}{30} = -\frac{14}{15}$$
In decimal form: $k \approx -0.9333$
